message:
✨ Move sidebar Customize button to dashboard floating menu (#919)

Move the "Customize" sidebar button from the bottom of the left sidebar
into the FloatingDashboardActions "+" menu. This keeps all dashboard
customization actions (Add Card, Templates, Reset, Export, Import,
Customize) in one place.

FloatingDashboardActions now self-contains SidebarCustomizer state,
so no changes needed in any of the 7 consumer components.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
